tools.name: processes.scriptProcessesList
tools.description: List information about processes made by or on behalf of a user, such as process type and current status.

tools.name: processes.scriptProcessesListScriptProcesses
tools.description: List information about a script's executed processes, such as process type and current status.

tools.name: projects.scriptProjectsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new, empty script project with no script files and a base manifest file.

tools.name: projects.scriptProjectsDeploymentsCreate
tools.description: Creates a deployment of an Apps Script project.

tools.name: projects.scriptProjectsDeploymentsDelete
tools.description: Deletes a deployment of an Apps Script project.

tools.name: projects.scriptProjectsDeploymentsGet
tools.description: Gets a deployment of an Apps Script project.

tools.name: projects.scriptProjectsDeploymentsList
tools.description: Lists the deployments of an Apps Script project.

tools.name: projects.scriptProjectsDeploymentsUpdate
tools.description: Updates a deployment of an Apps Script project.

tools.name: projects.scriptProjectsGetContent
tools.description: Gets the content of the script project, including the code source and metadata for each script file.

tools.name: projects.scriptProjectsGetMetrics
tools.description: Get metrics data for scripts, such as number of executions and active users.

tools.name: projects.scriptProjectsUpdateContent
tools.description: Updates the content of the specified script project. This content is stored as the HEAD version, and is used when the script is executed as a trigger, in the script editor, in add-on preview mode, or as a web app or Apps Script API in development mode. This clears all the existing files in the project.

tools.name: projects.scriptProjectsVersionsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new immutable version using the current code, with a unique version number.

tools.name: projects.scriptProjectsVersionsGet
tools.description: Gets a version of a script project.

tools.name: projects.scriptProjectsVersionsList
tools.description: List the versions of a script project.

tools.name: scripts.scriptScriptsRun
tools.description: Runs a function in an Apps Script project. The script project must be deployed for use with the Apps Script API and the calling application must share the same Cloud Platform project. This method requires authorization with an OAuth 2.0 token that includes at least one of the scopes listed in the [Authorization](#authorization-scopes) section; script projects that do not require authorization cannot be executed through this API. To find the correct scopes to include in the authentication token, open the script project **Overview** page and scroll down to "Project OAuth Scopes." The error `403, PERMISSION_DENIED: The caller does not have permission` indicates that the Cloud Platform project used to authorize the request is not the same as the one used by the script.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
